sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20632" key="bounai/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουναία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, epith. of Hera, because her temple stood on a <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βουνός</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:4:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4.7</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
